evals.prompt: 幫新客戶規劃 design guideline（互動教練模式）。
evals.expected_output: Starts Intake with exactly one question (client name or first missing field). Does not output full plan or write clients/ files until all intake questions are answered.
Presents one complete Guideline Plan in a single message for confirmation. Does not write blueprint.yaml or note.md before user confirms.

evals.prompt: 確認，照這個 plan 開始產出。
evals.expected_output: After explicit confirmation, builds clients/<slug>/ with intake.yaml, blueprint.yaml, index.yaml, note.md, coach_session.md, and updates plan status to confirmed.

evals.prompt: 不用談策略，直接幫我寫 Logo 章節。
evals.expected_output: During Intake, asks one challenge-related follow-up if skipping strategy; during Plan phase, records skip/TBD rather than writing Logo draft before plan confirmation.
